HomeAll toolsFAQQR Generator

Free online tools

Small, fast tools for developers and everyone else. No signup, no data sent to servers. Use in your browser and get results instantly.

Generator Tools

QR Code Generator

Create QR codes for URLs, text, and Wi‑Fi. Customize colors and size, download PNG.

Password Generator

Generate strong random passwords with customizable length and character sets.

UUID Generator

Generate UUIDs (v4) for unique identifiers. Copy or bulk generate.

Lorem Ipsum Generator

Generate placeholder text in paragraphs, sentences, or words.

Random Number Generator

Generate random numbers within a range. Single or multiple, with optional duplicates.

Developer Tools

JSON Formatter / Validator

Format, validate, and beautify JSON. Detect syntax errors.

Base64 Encoder / Decoder

Encode text to Base64 and decode Base64 to text. Works entirely in your browser.

URL Encoder / Decoder

Encode or decode URL-encoded (percent-encoded) strings.

Hash Generator

Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512 hashes from text.

Text Tools

Word Counter

Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs. No data sent to server.

Image Tools

Image Compressor

Compress images (JPEG/PNG/WebP) in the browser. Reduce file size before upload.

PNG to JPG Converter

Convert PNG images to JPG/JPEG. Adjust quality and download.

JPG to WebP Converter

Convert JPG/JPEG images to WebP format. Smaller file size, same quality.

Image Resizer

Resize images by pixels or percentage. Keep aspect ratio or set custom dimensions.

Image Crop Tool

Crop images to a selected area. Download the cropped result.

Image to Base64 Converter

Convert images to Base64 data URL. Copy or use in HTML/CSS.

PDF Tools

PDF to Word

Extract text from PDF and download as a Word (.docx) document.

Word to PDF

Convert Word (.docx) documents to PDF. Upload and download in your browser.

Merge PDF

Combine multiple PDF files into one. Reorder pages and download.

Split PDF

Split a PDF into multiple files by page range or one file per page.

Compress PDF

Reduce PDF file size by lowering image resolution. Works in your browser.

Add Watermark to PDF

Add text or image watermark to every page of your PDF.

QRGen

Free online tools for developers and everyone else. No signup required.
